global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple financial service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in lighter shades of green, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Secure & simple No hidden fees', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedger' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent black button with the text 'Start now', located at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, ClearLedger logo, secure and simple message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple No hidden fees, ClearLedger, Start now
